notice.bodyHtml:
Guidelines
Rules for a comfortable and enjoyable time
♡ ♡ ♡
👶
Origins / Appearance
Mama / Papa / Live2D model credits

Here's an introduction to what VTubers call their "Mama" and "Papa"!

· Mama (Illustration)

This is a collaborative work between a friend and myself. My friend handled most of it. I'm so happy to have such a wonderful appearance and such a wonderful friend! My friend is not currently active as an illustrator. Please refrain from contacting them through me.

· Papa (Modeling)

The Live2D modeling was handled by myself.

¥
About Financial Support
Notes on refund policy

For all forms of financial support including Super Chats and merch purchases,
we do not offer refunds. We are unable to respond to such inquiries.

Please make sure you are making an informed decision before supporting.

!
Official Images & Fan Art
Logo / Official images / Fan art / Common rules

[About the Logo]

Using official logos in derivative works is prohibited.
This is to avoid confusion about what is official.

[Official Images]

⭕ Setting as phone/PC wallpaper
⭕ Using as SNS header
⭕ Copying as fan art of Mitarai Asobu

❌ Using as SNS icons etc.
❌ Reposting

Using images as icons or headers is equivalent to re-uploading official images to the internet.
This is uniformly prohibited.

[Fan Art Images]

⭕ Using as SNS icon

❌ Claiming it is official
❌ Using fan art that closely resembles official images as an icon
(Please avoid anything that could be mistaken for official content.)

[For All Images]

Using images related to Mitarai Asobu in your profile while posting content about politics, religion, or other topics generally considered inappropriate for VTubers may threaten the Mitarai Asobu brand and is therefore prohibited. Your cooperation is appreciated.

#
Hashtags
Tag rules for your posts
#御手洗みたら？ General hashtag
🔗 View on X
  • Please use this hashtag for everything, including fan art, photos of merchandise, and stream impressions!
  • The "?" is not part of the hashtag itself, but please include it because it's cute.
  • If your artwork includes a character that is not meaningfully related to Mitarai Asobu, please do not include that character's name or hashtag in your post. For example, if it's a two-shot illustration with another VTuber I collaborated with, including both our names is fine. However, if it's a two-shot illustration with a character I personally like, please do not include that character's name or hashtag. This is to avoid bothering fans of that character, since seeing an unfamiliar VTuber appear in their favorite character's hashtag can be unpleasant. I truly appreciate the artwork itself! If you're unsure whether to post it publicly, please send it to me privately via DM instead. Since these favorite-character drawings are mostly an inside joke, I'd appreciate it if we could enjoy them quietly whenever possible.
#御手洗みてる For Mitarai Asobu only
🔗 View on X
  • This tag is only for posts that I make to everyone. Please do not use it yourself.
#御手洗みるな NSFW fan art
🔗 View on X
  • Do not use #御手洗みるな together with any other hashtags in the same post.
  • Please include a content warning such as エロ or グロ, written in full-width Katakana, with spaces before and after the word. Do not use half-width Katakana or censored spellings. This is so mute filters work properly. Please make sure the warning appears as a standalone word in full-width Katakana.
  • Mark your images as Sensitive so they are not shown unexpectedly.
  • Do not post content with explicit genital depictions or excessively graphic violence on X (Twitter).

These guidelines help keep X (Twitter) a safe place for minors and give parents peace of mind.

#御手洗もどき Cosplay
🔗 View on X
  • Do not use #御手洗もどき together with any other hashtags in the same post.
  • Even if your cosplay is suitable for all ages, please mark the images as Sensitive so they are not displayed unexpectedly.
  • If your photo shows any part of your face, please write 顔アリ in full-width Katakana. This includes partial facial features such as only your eyes or mouth.
  • Adult cosplay may use this hashtag, but you must also include a content warning such as エロ or グロ, written in full-width Katakana with spaces before and after the word. Do not use half-width Katakana or censored spellings so mute filters work correctly.
  • Do not post explicit genital depictions or excessively graphic violence on X (Twitter).

These guidelines help keep X (Twitter) a safe place for minors and give parents peace of mind.

Other Contest and event hashtags
  • Adult content may not use contest or event hashtags.
  • Unless specifically announced otherwise, cosplay entries may not use contest or event hashtags.
🎨
Paid Art Commissions
Skeb etc. / Posting OK / Reference images

It is OK to commission illustrators on Skeb etc. to draw Mitarai Asobu!

Posting those to SNS is also OK, but please read the "Official Images & Fan Art" section above carefully.

When posting, please use the tag #御手洗みたら？ — it would make me happy 🤍

Please share this site's URL with the illustrator you're commissioning. The images below should be helpful.

Sorry that a three-view sheet isn't ready yet 💦

The images below are reference materials for illustrators. Please do not use them for other purposes.

▶
About Official Videos
No falsification of clip videos

Please do not create or post clip videos that are falsified to appear different from the original content's intent.

📰
News Coverage
Compilations / Info accounts / News accounts etc.

Regarding posts on news sites, news accounts, VTuber info accounts, and similar.

Please refrain from featuring my activities on news or compilation sites.

Even if the news is positive, I do not wish for my activities or information to spread beyond what I can be involved in.

I ask that fans make a point of not viewing or spreading such posts.

🤖
Stream Assets / AI Usage
Thumbnails / Logo / Merch policy

In my activities, I use AI for stream overlays, props, わんコメ plugins, emergency logos, emergency announcement illustrations, and Live2D model design/quality improvements.

· Thumbnail Illustrations

I use AI illustrations from ChatGPT, Gemini, PixAI, etc. with additional manual edits applied.

· Images Used Directly for Commercial Purposes (Merch, etc.)

For directly sold items such as merch, I use only Mitarai Asobu's hand-drawn illustrations or commissioned illustrations.

AI-generated or AI-edited images will not be used on directly sold merch.

♡ ♡ ♡
Mitarai Asobu
Mitarai Asobu
